text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇷🇺🇸🇮🇱 The governor of Khuzestan Province said that US‑Israeli strikes hit several petrochemical units in the province, causing damage. Firefighting operations were carried out quickly. The smoke spreading in the air is from the release of flare gases…" ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 A fire at the Mahshahr petrochemical special economic zone has been contained after a US‑Israeli attack on ancillary facilities. Safety and emergency teams responded immediately, and the situation is under control. An assessment of technical damage is underway. Officials assured employees’ families that there is no cause for concern. @wfwitness

Ethiopia’s UN Vote on Israeli Settlement Sparks Criticism & Confusion at Home Ethiopia voted 'NO' on UN Human Rights Council resolution condemning Israeli settlements in Palestine, sparking domestic backlash for shifting its decade long diplomatic stand. Critics say the shift is a blow to Ethiopia's historic resistance against colonialism & Apartheid. READ MORE

Visioner 💔 The Russians killed 5 people in Nikopol. 19 people were injured, including a 14-year-old girl. The child is in the hospital. Doctors assess her condition as serious. The occupiers attacked the city with FPV drones. A fire broke out, damaging trade pavilions and a store. https://twitter.com/visionergeo/status/2040392177713283234/photo/1 tweet

Visioner ❌ Reuters: Ust-Luga and Primorsky still cannot handle cargo after a series of drone attacks. The attacks damaged the ports' infrastructure. The assaults lasted during the last two weeks of March — at least 5 strikes were carried out on Ust-Luga over 10 days. https://twitter.com/visionergeo/status/2040392054534980002/photo/1 tweet

Visioner 🪖 🇺🇦 Sirsky stated that the Armed Forces of Ukraine plan to change the military personnel training system: 🗣️ "It was decided to make changes to the content of the drone countermeasures training program and strengthen the technological component. The focus is on working with unmanned systems and fighting against drones." tweet

Visioner 🇺🇦 🇷🇺 Amid Ukrainian air strikes, the Kremlin is starting to relocate missile factories to Russia's internal regions - reports Telegraph. https://twitter.com/visionergeo/status/2040390802946261491/photo/1 tweet

Visioner 🇺🇦 🇷🇺 "Want to know the truth? Well, the Ukrainians have started bombing us with drones, and time is really running out for us. The enemy can create such chaos that last year will seem much weaker in comparison. This is already a war of attrition, and the Ukrainians are conducting it very well." - Z blogger, Yuri Podolyaka. tweet

Nuno Felix RT @Mpolymer : On bashing the French and the British…a kind “Go pound sand” to the Fox News crowd who seems to have found their new talking point…so a quick note right here… that in my old world, both countries have been with us time and again. Actual professionals who have been in conflict-not DC creatures who were press secretaries like Ari-know the real deal. For example -the French military provided critical assistance to US SOF during a deadly ambush in Niger in 2017. Saved lives. In extremis. Huge appreciation from the US IC and SOF world. We know when friends come thru. Overall French CT efforts in Africa-who had the lead over us for many years- also helped save US lives. And don’t forget 90 French military were KIA in Afghanistan. That’s a pretty solid ally, when we were in a pinch. Next-US and British forces and intel r tied at the hip, but let’s focus in Afghanistan and Iraq. With 600 plus British KIA in both conflicts. 600 plus. This is all real sacrifice. British intel also on daily basis helps us wrap up terrorist networks, stop proliferation of WMD, better u detest and Russia, Iran, N Korea, and China, so many other massive value added they provide. A superb ally. Essential even. Finally, as Jonah notes, Trump is totally responsible for poisoning the alliance. European reluctance to assist is largely because Trump is so toxic it is politically impossible for other democracies-whose citizens loathe Trump to the core-to do anything other than give us the finger. So all said, as a former ntl security professional who got my hands dirty in our global escapades alongside these allies, I say thank u to them. Particularly!! the British and the French. Have a lovely day. I agree with some of this directionally, but my God the refusal to acknowledge that Trump has worked assiduously to poison the alliance and heap all the blame on Europe is just water-carrying hackery. Saying "NATO will never be the same, and Western European weakness and acquiescence is the cause" is like writing a movie review when you missed the first half of the movie. - Jonah Goldberg tweet

WarTranslated Ukraine’s intelligence says Russia’s data centers are starting to fall apart as aging gear fails and replacements are hard to get. The problem is hitting smaller commercial sites first, with about 20% of data centers affected. Fiber networks from the early 2000s are also wearing out. tweet

🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 IRGC Navy Command: A drone strike hit the ship MSC Ishika, affiliated with the Zionist regime, in the Strait of Hormuz area; the vessel was engulfed in a massive fire. الله اكبر و لله الحمد
🇮🇷 🇦🇪 Iranian air defenses shot down a second UAE drone, believed to be a Chinese-made Wing Loong II. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 Al-Akhbar reports that a Israeli strike hit a residential building in Habouch, causing injuries. The town of Dibl has been under an Israeli siege for about a week, preventing residents from moving and causing severe shortages of basic necessities. The fate of a humanitarian aid convoy, to be led by the papal ambassador and heading to Rmeish, Dibl and Ain Ibl on Sunday, remains uncertain due to Israeli threats. @wfwitness

↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇱🇮🇶🇮🇷 The Iraqi Border Crossing Authority reported that U.S. / Israeli airstrikes on the Shalamcheh border crossing killed one Iraqi national and injured five others. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇮🇶 🇰🇼 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 Al-Ahad's correspondent in Basra reports that trade and travel through the Shalamjah border crossing between Iraq and Iran will resume soon after damage assessments are completed. A victim killed in the strike will be transferred to Basra. The head of the Al-Sadiqoun bloc held Kuwait responsible for the incident. Today's attack on Shalamjah was the fourth since the start of the war on Iran. Most previous strikes hit the commercial exchange square, but today the passenger hall was targeted. @wfwitness

⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇳 Iran’s Atomic Energy Organisation spokesman Behrouz Kamalvandi said Tehran has warned regional countries about the consequences of continued attacks on its nuclear facilities. He stated that the enemy has struck the Bushehr plant four times, with no casualties or radiation leaks, and that no contamination has been detected at Natanz or Ardakan. Kamalvandi criticised IAEA Director General Rafael Grossi for biased statements, including what he called an unprofessional reference to Iran’s “nuclear ambitions” and a suggestion that nuclear war could eliminate them. He said Iran has sent 12 letters to the agency and that Grossi should call an emergency Board of Governors meeting. He accused the IAEA of being under the political influence of Western countries, the U.S. and Israel. @wfwitness
🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 US fighter jet turned to SCRAP and 'being loaded onto pickup truck' — Tasnim

⚡️ 🇮🇹 🇸🇦 🇶🇦 Italian Prime Minister Giorgia Meloni arrived in Qatar for a visit after meeting Saudi Crown Prince Mohammed bin Salman in Riyadh on Friday. Meloni is the first leader from a NATO or EU country to visit the Gulf states since the start of the war. @wfwitness

It's worth noting that this is the second such incident in two days. Also, considering the installation of…" 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 Yesterday, Iran’s spokesperson said, “We need clarification from one of the two countries in the region that use this drone!”

⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 Iranian parliamentary speaker Mohammad-Bagher Ghalibaf said Tehran had prepared for the confrontation and proved its defensive capabilities. He stated that the war is Israel’s war and that Iran was forced to target U.S. interests in the region to preserve its existence. He warned that any further escalation against Iran will be met with a decisive and wide-ranging response against US interests in the region. Ghalibaf added that regional security should be built without US or Israeli involvement. @wfwitness

🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 The downing of a Wing Loong 2 drone in Bushehr by Iranian air defenses. The drone is only owned by the UAE and Saudi Arabia in the region. It's worth noting that this is the second such incident in two days. Also, considering the installation of pylons under the wings, it is completely clear that this drone is armed with various air-dropped bombs to attack different targets inside Iran.

⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 The mayor of Nahariya, reservist colonel and former brigade commander Ronen Marly, said: “It is unacceptable to me that in Beirut they continue to sit in cafes and restaurants. The landlord must go crazy. We need to respond forcefully in Lebanon.” @wfwitness

Babak Taghvaee, a writer and analyst claiming to have sources within CENTCOM says the pilot of the F-15 that went down in Iran was likely killed, while the WSO (Weapons Systems Officer) was rescued with serious injuries due to the low altitude of the ejection. He also claims that search-and-rescue operations have ended. This is unverified. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 Hezbollah claimed a series of rocket attacks on Israeli targets on Saturday, including two barrages on Kiryat Shmona, and strikes on Metulla, Beit Hillel, Misgav Am, Yiftah barracks and artillery positions in Avivim. The group also said it targeted the Mount Neria base at the Meron air control facility. Footage released showed attacks on an Israeli bulldozer and a Merkava tank near the towns of Khiam and Taybeh in southern Lebanon. @wfwitness

⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇪🇺 Iran’s embassy in Vienna stated that international law must be respected for all countries, or no one has the right to apply it selectively. The statement responded to what it called irresponsible remarks by EU officials regarding US‑Israeli aggression against Iran and the situation in the Strait of Hormuz. The embassy noted that EU foreign policy chief Kallas spoke of the need for Iran to respect the UN Convention on the Law of the Sea, a treaty which Iran is not even a party to. It added that Iran was a committed member of the Nuclear Non‑Proliferation Treaty, yet its peaceful nuclear facilities under NPT safeguards were attacked. @wfwitness
⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 Israeli airstrikes targeted the town of Deir El Zahrani in Southern Lebanon. @wfwitness

🔥 BABYLON BURNING Most channels follow the slogans. We follow the balance sheet. Wars are sold as values. Then the oil spikes, the shipping lanes close, the contractors line up, and someone starts pricing “peace.” That’s where BABYLON BURNING begins. We track the machinery behind the headlines: who gains, who pays, who is repositioning, and who is dressing up profit as principle. Inside the channel: ➡️ sharp morning briefs on what moved overnight ➡️ market-aware war coverage: oil, shipping, sanctions, reconstruction ➡️ fast reads on Iran, Israel, Ukraine, Turkey, the U.S., the Gulf, Europe ➡️ quotes decoded as signals, not theater ➡️ analysis without flag-waving, wishful thinking, or ideological perfume This is not a channel for people looking for comfort. It is a channel for people who want the real architecture of events: money, leverage, logistics, power. No cheering sections. No sacred narratives. No optimism without evidence. 📌 Subscribe to BABYLON BURNING Facts. Money. The real picture. @BabylonBurning #ad

Nuno Felix RT @gideonrachman : I’ve got news for you. The governments of Poland and the Baltic states distrust and dislike the Trump administration even more than the western Europeans because they are directly threatened by Trump’s friendliness towards Putin. The UN vote where the US voted with Russia and N.Korea against Ukraine is copied and framed on the wall of the Estonian foreign ministry When this is over, the western part of NATO will never be the same. Spain, England, France and Italy have sold us out, as they too often have a history of doing. Eastern European nations are the heart of NATO. They spend money on defense, know how to fight and love the US. France particularly deserves fault and blame. From supporting China and Russia at the UN to denying Americans overflight rights, they’re doing what they’ve always done - showing weakness, while cutting deals with terrorists. (The reason the US has a Marine Corps and Navy is unlike France, we refused to pay a ransom to the Barbary Pirates. France is always happy to cut a deal.) Wars have unintended consequences as nations show their true colors. NATO will never be the same, and Western European weakness and acquiescence is the cause. - Ari Fleischer tweet

Visioner 🇮🇷 BREAKING | Iran plans to classify countries into hostile, neutral, and friendly categories. Hostile countries will be banned from passing through the Strait of Hormuz, while neutral countries will have to pay a fee for transit, - Al Jazeera. Since the start of the war, 400 million barrels of oil have been removed from the international market. Before the war, nearly 20% of the world's crude oil and liquefied natural gas (LNG) passed through the Strait of Hormuz, but this figure has now dropped to only about 5% of the norm. See the latest updates with us: @visionergeo tweet

⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇮🇷 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 The Israeli military announced that they have completed an additional wave of strikes in Beirut, targeting facilities used by the Lebanon Corps of Iran’s Quds Force. The Lebanon Corps serves as a alleged link between Hezbollah and the Iranian regime and supports Hezbollah’s military capabilities. Two alleged headquarters of the Islamic Jihad group, used by its leadership to coordinate with Hezbollah and plan attacks against Israel, were also struck. The Israeli Navy additionally struck an alleged Hezbollah observation post. @wfwitness

🇮🇷 🇮🇱 ⚡ Israeli attacks on a major petrochemical plant in Bandar-e Mahshahr, southwest Iran. There have also been attacks on oil-rich cities including Abadan, Khorramshahr, and Mehran near the Iran-Iraq border.

⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 🇺🇳 The semi-official Tasnim News Agency reported a new attack targeting the vicinity of Iran’s Bushehr nuclear plant. The International Atomic Energy Agency said it had received no reports of any increase in radiation levels at the facility following the strike. @wfwitness

Nuno Felix This is amazing commentary in how distorted it is from reality French relations with Israel and the United Arab Emirates have been severely damaged by Macron. The relationship with the US has also taken a massive hit. If a new Middle East will emerge, shaped by the US, Israel and Gulf Arabs, France is unlikely to play a role in it. - Ulrich Speck tweet
